theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

verdicts.name: Hyperliquid
verdicts.note: Perp DEX 1위 + Prediction Markets 진입, 일매출 폭증
verdicts.label: HOLD

narrative.summary: Hyperliquid: 정량 종합 56점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 60 / 중기 68 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 극과열
overheat.guidance: 회피하거나 차익실현. 지금 진입은 단기 손실 위험 매우 큼.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +47.4% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $39.48 아래 손절가 $34.39 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

timeframes.note: 가격이 50/200MA 위 + 골든 크로스 · RSI 과매수

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Oil Holds Biggest Gain in a Month on Standoff in US-Iran Talks
top_news.summary: Oil steadied after its biggest gain in about a month, as uncertainty about the state of US-Iran peace talks raised the risk that energy flows from the Persian Gulf could be curtailed for longer.

top_news.title: Oil Holds Gains, US Futures Slip on War Confusion: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: US equity futures edged lower and oil held gains as Washington struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track.

top_news.title: Anthropic’s First-Mover IPO Edge Set to Widen Lead Over OpenAI
top_news.summary: Anthropic PBC pulled ahead of OpenAI with its confidential IPO filing Monday, as the free-spending artificial intelligence startups battle for a fundraising edge that’s set to determine who will win the ultimate battle for computing power.

top_news.title: Elliott Takes Stake in Miner Northern Star, Pushing for Review
top_news.summary: Elliott Investment Management LP has built a large stake in Northern Star Resources Ltd. and is pushing for a strategic review and leadership changes at the Australian mining company.

top_news.title: CFTC Awards Five Whistleblowers $8 Million for Enforcement Tips
top_news.summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission said it will award more than $8 million to five whistleblowers who provided information that helped agency investigators recover funds for defrauded investors.

top_news.title: AI Compute To Become a Wall Street Asset
top_news.summary: Wall Street may be creating the first market for AI compute. Silicon Data CEO Carmen Li joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI futures could become as important as oil futures, how companies will hedge higher GPU costs, and why AI token prices are still rising despite more efficient models. (Correct: Video replaced with proper guest) (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Wall Street Week | Britain’s Debt Problem, Poland’s Economic Boom (Correct)
top_news.summary: This week, the UK’s debt burden and weak growth are reviving fears that financial markets could once again destabilize British politics and policy. And, investors see data centers as long-term infrastructure, but neighbors worry about noise, water use, power demand and lasting costs. Plus, is Poland is one of the world’s fastest-growing economies, but it faces challenges to keep up its rapid rate of growth. top_news.title: Stocks Rise on Trump’s Iran Remarks, AI Optimism: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: A rebound on Wall Street drove stocks to all-time highs as President Donald Trump said talks with Iran are continuing at a rapid pace, with the market also rising on renewed artificial-intelligence enthusiasm.

top_news.title: Return Stacked ETF Outpaces S&P 500
top_news.summary: Corey Hoffstein, CEO and CIO of Newfound Research, joins Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They drill down into the Return Stacked US Stocks and Managed Futures ETF (ticker: RSST). (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Look at Returns on Risk-Adjusted Basis: Reiner
top_news.summary: Hamilton Reiner, CIO of the US core equity team and head of US equity derivatives at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)
